items.title: Why You Should Drop @expo/vector-icons for React Native Vector Icons
items.description:
Switching from @expo/vector-icons to React Native's official icon packages can cut your bundle size by 4MB or more. Here's how to make the change and why Expo now recommends it.

If you've built React Native apps with Expo, you've probably used @expo/vector-icons.
